title: basicly agent block source
description: A shared agent building block authored as <id>.block.yaml, composed into agent bodies by slot reference.

schema_version.description: Source-format version; bump only when the loader contract changes.

id.description: Block identifier (lowercase kebab-case); must match the file name stem.

description.description: One line stating what this block contributes to an agent body.

override.description: Required true when an overlay block replaces a core block of the same id.

body.description: Markdown composed verbatim into agent bodies that reference this block.
